name: ContraPoints
analysis_notes: Scored by Sonnet 4.5 from transcript analysis. Sophisticated film criticism essay that challenges the 'torture porn' critical consensus. Demonstrates research depth through engagement with critical discourse (Edelstein, 2000s film reviews). Extremely high information density with personal narrative skillfully integrated into cultural analysis. Highly original defense of maligned genre through framework of media literacy development. Strong lasting impact through meta-commentary on critical thinking and moral panic.
